LAW AND MOTION 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 20, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE DEFENDANT THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DEFENDANT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 5, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2014 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court TAKES Order To Show Cause Hearing OFF CALENDAR PER DEFENDANT'S NOTICE OF REMOVAL AND NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY STAY FILED 11/15/2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Order To Show Cause Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Continued To Nov-20-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Order To Show Cause Hearing is continued to November 20, 2013 to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 5, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
